data.title: Nansen: 86% of LIBRA traders lost a total of $251 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Nansen data, the LIBRA scandal in Argentina last weekend caused investors to lose hundreds of millions of dollars in wealth. On-chain data tracked by Nansen showed that 86% of traders lost a total of $251 million, while the winners only made $180 million in profits. In other words, LIBRA is a "net negative wealth creation" event that may suck away market liquidity. Nansen data shows that between February 16 and 18, 70% of wallets that traded LIBRA ultimately suffered losses. (Coindesk)

data.title: IntoTheBlock: Base ecosystem token trading volume fell 78% compared to December last year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data disclosed by IntoTheBlock, although Base quickly became one of the preferred platforms for retail traders in the Ethereum Layer-2 ecosystem in 2024, the recent market correction has put pressure on its ecosystem. Data shows that only a few token holders in the Base ecosystem are currently profitable, which has reduced the enthusiasm of retail investors to participate. In terms of trading volume, the on-chain trading volume of the 8 Base ecosystem tokens tracked by IntoTheBlock has dropped 78% from December 2024.

data.title: Trump Plans Visit To Fort Knox To Verify Gold Reserves
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on Wednesday, February 20, U.S. President Donald Trump announced to reporters his intention to visit Fort Knox to ensure the gold reserves are indeed there.

Fort Knox, located in Kentucky, is a U.S. Army base that houses more than half of the U.S. Treasury's gold reserves. In the 1930s, the U.S. Treasury moved gold from New York and Philadelphia to Fort Knox to make it less vulnerable to attacks. The remaining gold bars are stored in facilities in Denver and West Point, New York.

Previously, Elon Musk suggested on the X platform that the gold reserves at Fort Knox should be audited at least annually.

data.title: Ethereum NFT Game Fantasy Top Launches Free Version on Monad Testnet
data.description: According to Odaily, the Ethereum-based NFT game Fantasy Top has announced on platform X that its free version is now available on the L1 blockchain Monad testnet.

data.title: Technological Convergence in 2025: Opportunities and Challenges
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the convergence of various technologies such as blockchain, artificial intelligence (AI), robotics, virtual reality (VR), and augmented reality (AR) is expected to present significant opportunities in 2025. Christian Thompson, managing director of the Sui Foundation, shared his insights at the Consensus 2025 event in Hong Kong. He highlighted the potential of integrating AI agents into blockchains, which could lead to transformative developments across multiple sectors.

Thompson emphasized the unique potential of these technologies, noting that AI, robotics, AR, VR, and blockchain offer new ways to own and manage assets. He believes that as these technologies merge, they will create pivotal moments, particularly in the realms of blockchain and AI. Thompson anticipates that these advancements are imminent and will occur within the current technological cycle.

Blockchain companies have already begun incorporating AI to improve user experiences and operational efficiency. For instance, Kite AI, a decentralized AI infrastructure provider, launched an AI-focused testnet on February 6. Additionally, the 0G Foundation introduced an $88.88 million ecosystem fund on February 5 to support projects developing AI-powered decentralized finance (DeFi) applications and autonomous agents, known as DeFAI agents.

Thompson also predicts that this technological cycle may witness the meaningful adoption of payment systems, driven by regulatory and policy clarity that encourages developers to explore the space. He suggests that increased investment liquidity will likely occur, with venture capitalists, funds, and private family offices gaining confidence to invest in the sector. Regulatory clarity is expected to unlock new investment opportunities, facilitating a transition from Web2 to Web3 and fostering experimentation, research, and development.

In the United States, there have been calls for a regulatory overhaul of the crypto sector under U.S. President Donald Trump's administration to maintain a competitive edge globally. However, some skeptics, including U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren, continue to advocate for stricter regulations on the industry. The ongoing debate highlights the challenges and opportunities that lie ahead as these technologies continue to evolve and converge.

data.title: Trump Considers Direct Payments To Americans From Cost Savings
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced he is contemplating distributing a portion of the savings from Elon Musk's cost-cutting initiatives directly to American citizens. Speaking at the FII Priority Summit, sponsored by Saudi Arabia's sovereign wealth fund, Trump mentioned the possibility of returning 20% to U.S. citizens and using another 20% to reduce national debt. However, he did not provide further details about the plan.

Earlier this week, James Fishback, co-founder of investment firm Azoria, suggested on social media that the federal government issue rebate checks based on savings from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). Musk responded to this idea on the X platform, indicating he would discuss it with the President.

Fishback proposed that Trump collaborate with Congress to establish a 'DOGE Dividend' or tax rebate checks funded by $400 billion, representing 20% of DOGE's $2 trillion savings target. He estimated that if the savings were distributed to taxpayer households, each could receive approximately $5,000. The exact amount DOGE has saved remains unclear.

During his first term, Trump issued stimulus checks to Americans when the COVID-19 pandemic severely impacted the U.S. economy. Musk's team is currently working on significant budget cuts and layoffs within federal agencies. The billionaire and Tesla CEO aims for a $2 trillion reduction in federal spending, which he describes as the 'ideal outcome.'

Musk assured that the 'DOGE Dividend' would not trigger inflation, as the funds would solely come from expenditure cuts, benefiting primarily taxpayers with a propensity to save. Musk received a standing ovation when introduced by Trump, who praised him as a person of 'very high IQ,' while acknowledging some minor flaws.

data.title: BNB/USDT 永续合约多空持仓人数比为 1.9，资金费率为 -0.0031%
data.description: 据币安行情数据显示，BNB/USDT 永续合约多空持仓人数比为 1.9，多头占主导地位。目前，资金费率为 -0.0031%。 多空持仓人数比和资金费率都是衡量合约市场多空力量的指标。
